title: Force - REKT
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by withdrawal from xFORCE contract

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls transferFrom() after a flash loan in the same tx

red_flags: other hackers arrived to feed on the leftovers
monitoring_rules: BLOCK transferFrom() calls within 10 seconds of a flash loan
summary: A white hat hacker exploited a vulnerability in the FORCE/xFORCE contract by taking advantage of a flash loan to withdraw 14,833 FORCE. A guard could have blocked such transactions by monitoring for flash loans followed by calls to transferFrom().
